title: senecio provincialis
intro: Senecio provincialis, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like constipation. Groundsel can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health benefits, including relieving coughs and sore throats.
